title: ASR Outdoor 9 in 1 Multitool Folding Pocket Knife with G10 Handle, Black
description:
A durable and reliable survival knife is a must have item to include with survival kits, emergency preparedness items and camping gear; add a multitool function and you'll be well equipped for challenges, tasks and repairs that may cross your path when out in the wilderness. This particular ASR Outdoor 9 in 1 pocket knife features the following: spring assisted folding blade with helpful thumb rise, window punch, 6pc interchangeable screwdriver bit set, gut hook knife and wire cutter, bottle opener, hex wrench, spoke wrench, regular wrench, flat head screwdriver and built in belt clip for on person carrying and easy accessibility

ASR Outdoor 9 in 1 Multitool Folding Pocket Knife with G10 Handle, Black

A durable and reliable survival knife is a must have item to include with survival kits, emergency preparedness items and camping gear; add a multitool function and you'll be well equipped for challenges, tasks and repairs that may cross your path when out in the wilderness. This particular ASR Outdoor 9 in 1 pocket knife features the following: spring assisted folding blade with helpful thumb rise, window punch, 6pc interchangeable screwdriver bit set, gut hook knife and wire cutter, bottle opener, hex wrench, spoke wrench, regular wrench, flat head screwdriver and built in belt clip for on person carrying and easy accessibility.

Key Features

  • 9 in 1 MULTITOOL POCKET KNIFE: This formidable survival knife will keep you prepared and equipped in the great outdoors; the pocket knife features a spring assisted folding blade with helpful thumb rise, window punch, 6pc interchangeable screwdriver bit set, gut hook knife and wire cutters, bottle opener, hex wrench, spoke wrench, regular wrench, flat head screwdriver and built in belt clip
  • G10 KNIFE HANDLE: Featuring a G10 handle, this fabrication ensures long lasting durability, strength and endurance against tons of wear and tear; the G10 finish also makes this survival knife highly water resistant meaning it can be used in wet conditions time and time again that will not affect its long term performance
  • VERSATILE APPLICATIONS: All the tools built in to this pocket knife make it not only a reliable item to include with survival kits and when camping but is also suitable to carry for hiking, hunting, fishing, biking, trekking, asan EDC knife and even home improvement
  • MULTITOOL SHEATH: This stainless steel folding pocket knife comes with a nylon pouch for safe storage when not in use; the case features a secure Velcro closure, exterior velcro closing storage compartment for bits, and a key ring loop or belt attachment for different on and off person carrying options
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 8.25 x 1.25 x 1 inch; Blade Length: 3.5 inches; Material: Stainless Steel; Color: Black; Weight: 0.5lbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KB908CYWT
  • UPC: 810058482938
  • Color: Black
  • Size: Small

A unique feature of this pocket knife is its G10 exterior handle finish (glass based epoxy resin laminate to be specific); this fabrication ensures long lasting durability, strength and endurance, standing up to all the wear and tear you throw its way. Importantly, the G10 finish also makes this survival knife highly water resistant, meaning it can be used in wet conditions time and time again, and its long term performance will not be affected. In addition to its durable stainless steel and G10 construction, this ASR Outdoor pocket knife or tactical knife comes with a handy nylon multitool sheath for safe storage and protection when not in use or when traveling. The nylon case features a secure Velcro closure, exterior Velcro closing storage compartment for bits, and a key ring loop or belt attachment for different on and off person carrying options.

All the tools built in to this pocket knife make it not only a reliable item to include with survival kits and when camping, but is also suitable to carry for hiking, hunting, fishing, biking, trekking, as an EDC knife and even to help around the house with home improvement. The folding pocket knife multitool makes great gifts for men and any outdoor enthusiasts, stocking stuffers, fathers day gifts, gifts for brother, gifts for husband and more.
